transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I'd like to schedule a pre-marital blood test package. Getting married next month.
AGENT: Congratulations! Yes, we offer a comprehensive pre-marital health screening package. Your name and number?
CALLER: Rohan Pillai. And my fiance's name is Ananya Bhat. 9867009988.
AGENT: Lovely. The package includes blood group, HIV, thalassemia, blood sugar, and a few other standard tests. Both of you can come together. Next available date for two people is Thursday morning.
CALLER: Thursday morning works for us. What time?
AGENT: 9 AM, so you can get it done before work. Booked for Rohan Pillai and Ananya Bhat. Please come fasting for 8-10 hours. Congratulations once again!
CALLER: Thank you so much!
